name: Randy Newman
abstract: Randall Stuart Newman (born November 28, 1943) is an American singer-songwriter, pianist, composer, and arranger. Born in Los Angeles to an extended family of Hollywood film composers, he is known for his  Americana-inspired songs, non-rhotic Southern-accented singing, and lyrics that are often mordant or satirical and delivered by an un…

about_quotes.speaker: Jerry Hey
about_quotes.evidence: I played on “I Love L.A.” with Randy Newman on the session that we did on that record.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jerry Hey interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, November 2, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Fred Lipsius
about_quotes.evidence: He says, “I want you to play piano to back up Artie on this first album, on a Randy Newman tune, ‘Old Man,’ about an old man dying.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Fred Lipsius interviewed by Monk Rowe. Boston, Massachusetts, July 25, 2018

about_quotes.speaker: Mark Soskin
about_quotes.evidence: And there was one record we did, the music of Randy Newman, and that was nominated for a Grammy.
about_quotes.doc_title: Mark Soskin interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, September 17, 2021
